contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Permanent Places Details cache via places-cache repo (Contents API)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/97
  
  Details:
  Built a persistent cache for Google Places Details that eliminates repeated paid calls for the same place_id across the codebase. (1) Bootstrapped TrueSightDAO/places-cache repo via Contents API: README documenting schema + freshness model + plug-and-play architecture parallel, .gitignore, places/ directory seed. (2) New scripts/places_cache.py module exposing cached_place_details_full and cached_place_details_lite. Reads via Contents API (not raw.githubusercontent.com — that CDN has ~5min staleness which produced false-misses + 422 retry writes on first attempt). Writes use dedicated PLACES_CACHE_PAT fine-grained token. Field-coverage check ensures lite-cached records can satisfy lite requests but full requests trigger union refetch. (3) Refactored all six Place Details call sites: google_places_lookup.py (canonical helper, used by hit_list_enrich_contact), discover_apothecaries_la_hit_list.py (had inline call), hit_list_research_photo_review.py (now lite tier — only photos needed), backfill_instagram_la_discovery.py, hit_list_extract_email_gemini.py. (4) Dropped Atmosphere fields (rating + user_ratings_total) from every Details request after exhaustive audit confirmed nobody reads them — that alone is ~/1k savings = 25% reduction. Live-tested: cache miss → fetch → write 1806ms; cache hit 490ms; identical bytes.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
